mapper.select: SELECT * FROM chapter_reviews WHERE parent_id = #{reviewId} ORDER BY created_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chapter_reviews (user_id, book_id, chapter_number, content, parent_id, is_spoiler, like_count, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{bookId}, #{chapterNumber}, #{content}, #{parentId}, #{isSpoiler}, COALESCE(#{likeCount}, 0), #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
INSERT INTO chapter_review_likes (review_id, user_id, created_at) VALUES (#{reviewId}, #{userId}, NOW()) ON CONFLICT (review_id, user_id) DO NOTHING
